title: Rioux Test for Catecholates
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.icrcav6

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.2 mL 20% sulfuric acid to 2.3 mL H 2 O and mix

steps.title: Add 1 mL sample (or H...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL sample (or H 2 O for blank, DHBA for standard curve) undetermined

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 mL 1% ferric ammonium citrate (in 0.09 N H 2 SO 4 ) and mix undetermined

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.4 mL 2 M ammonium fluoride and mix undetermined

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.4 mL 1% 1,10-penanthroline and mix undetermined Add 0.4 mL water for turbidity blank.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.6 mL 3 M hexamethyl tetramine undetermined

steps.title: Cool to room temperature and read...
steps.instruction: Cool to room temperature and read in spectrophotometer at 510 nm
